title: Nerv HQ layout
wikitext:
[]: Nerv HQ layout             Quote Post by idohavetheflu » Sun Apr 18, 2021 7:23 pm After watching End of Evangelion for the second time I always wondered what Nerv Hq looked like on the inside. Does anybody have an idea of what it looks like it looks like on the inside?

[]: Re: Nerv HQ layout             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Apr 18, 2021 11:08 pm There's a superstructure (the pyramid) and a substructure where the rest of Nerv is located, like the command room and the Evangelion cages. We know the substructure is quite deep, since an Evangelion has to travel several tens (if not hundreds) of body lengths to get to Terminal Dogma, and that space is big enough for there to be entire ships that don't even come close to scraping the ceiling. Anecdotally, people enter Nerv through the superstructure and it looks like they can take a long escalator down to the substructure. The command room seems to be located adjacent to the Evangelion cages, since Shinji in episode 19 is seen to push Zeruel through the walls of the command center (which Zeruel reached by descending into a large pipe of some kind) and into an Evangelion cage, then up into a launch tube from which it launches to the surface of the Geofront. Misato and co. are able to run outside fairly quickly, suggesting the command room isn't that far from the surface. As to the actual physical layout, maybe there are production sketches somewhere?

[]: Re: Nerv HQ layout             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Apr 19, 2021 4:42 pm To my knowledge there are no hard layout sketches, but what we do know is that the launch pads are situated around the edges of the geofront, based on various scenes in the show and the fact that there is no other place to put them

[]: Re: Nerv HQ layout             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Apr 20, 2021 6:58 am It seems that Nerv's central command level is hexagonal, if Misato's map is any indication - https://wiki.evageeks.org/File:Level_B-20.jpg And the wiki article has some additional useful information, despite its shabby condition- https://wiki.evageeks.org/Nerv_Headquarters

[]: Re: Nerv HQ layout             Quote Post by DiracSea902 » Tue Jun 01, 2021 12:44 am Keep in mind that this is partially headcanon, but if all command and control structures are located within Central Dogma, and Terminal Dogma holds all the classified materials, then I would wager the NERV Pyramid holds all the clerical and executive offices for NERV. HR, Payroll, Gendo's and Fuyutsuki's offices, etc.
